header.note: Language-neutral snapshot of the TS model verdicts for visibility/propagation geometry (V1..V9) and scoped visibility (S2a/S2b). The AUTHORITATIVE runner is the TS model in Proofs/lineage-group-model; the Rust conformance suite cannot re-prove TS logic and validates only structure + manifest hash.

authoritative_runner: TS model in Proofs/lineage-group-model (authoritative; Rust suite validates structure only)
provenance: lineage-group-model: npm run emit-conformance (experiments V/S2/E216 run())

experiments.name: V1: Regime is born-in and immutable (genesis-fixed)
V2: Content carries origin regime in signed data
V3: No silent regime crossing — forward op is structurally absent
V4: Republish exposes only author-chosen content; no intimate member enumeration
V5: Outward propagation depth enforced by verifier — hostile sender
V6: Openness class caps propagation depth — over-permissive genesis is invalid
V7: Inward visibility and outward propagation are independently controllable
V8: Public membership leaks only affiliation — hostile enumeration fails
V9: Joining public group does not auto-mutate intimate graph
S2a: Structure-only share re-identifies (topology is a fingerprint) — unrepresentable
S2b: Only consented-distance/resolution-scoped sharing is representable
